steps.title: Write the cost inequality
steps.content: If $h$ is the number of rental hours, the total cost is the hourly rental cost plus the lesson cost: $$50h+15\le 285$$

steps.title: Solve the inequality
steps.content: Subtract $15$ and divide by $50$ to isolate $h$: $$50h\le 270$$ $$h\le \frac{270}{50}$$ $$h\le 5.4$$

steps.title: Use whole hours
steps.content: The rental is available only for a whole number of hours, so the maximum whole number no greater than $5.4$ is $5$. The answer is 5.
